mainMenuSubtitle: A party card game for drinking rounds with friends.
mainMenuBrandTagline: The easiest poker drinking game for your friends table
mainMenuQuickStartSubtitle: Lock in the headline game first, then decide how far the whole table wants to push the night.
mainMenuSectionPrompt: Pick the round to open tonight
mainMenuIntroSubtitle: Start with headcount, then decide whether this room warms up, runs hot, or goes straight to the main table.
mainMenuSectionStarterSupport: Get everyone into the same rhythm before the table heats up.
mainMenuSectionClassicSupport: Move the room from warm-up rounds toward the headline table.
mainMenuSectionChallengeSupport: The heaviest rounds of the night are all waiting here.
gameHorseRaceSubtitle: Continuous pacing that lifts the table mood quickly.
gameChallengeReservedSubtitle: Reserved for a harsher party mode later on.
gameLevelStarterHint: The fastest warm-up tier to get the table moving.
gameLevelClassicHint: The room is loose, and the pace settles in.
gameLevelChallengeHint: The headline table where pressure and penalties peak.
gameCardPyramidSubtitle: The higher the pyramid climbs, the harder the whole table pays.
gameCompareSubtitle: The easiest rules and quickest rounds, ideal as the starter mode.
gameTitleSubtitle: The core headline-table mode with the most tension.
gameChallengeSubtitle: Reserved for a harsher, higher-pressure party mode later.
tutorialContent:
Welcome to Pyramid Poker!

Rules:
1. Flip a card in the pyramid and guess whether the next card from the deck will be higher or lower.
...
penaltyFormula: Penalty formula: layer multiplier × cards × initial unit × tie penalty
manualRevealHint: Swipe up, down, left, or right to reveal the deck card
